title: ERCOT DAM PTP Obligation Option Awards 60 Day CSV download
description:
Day-ahead, hourly, point-to-point (PTP) obligation awards to Non-Opt-In Entities (NOIEs) or their Qualified Scheduling Entity (QSE) in ERCOT, which are linked to an owned Congestion Revenue Rights (CRR) option. 

DAM PTP Obligation Options are modeled as obligations but settle like an option in real-time.
